title: マイルCSの後に・大団円

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki, Biko Pegasus, and Hishi Akebono
finish the Mile Championship in a blaze of glory.
They grin at each other in satisfied exhaustion
after running their hearts out in a fierce struggle
for first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their positive emotions touch the hearts of the
audience too. Even the younger racer who has
been watching Fuji Kiseki is moved to tears.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, she asks to participate in the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen, a 1,200-meter G1 turf
sprint.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm puzzled by her straightforward suggestion
considering how much of a trickster she usually is,
but she must have a reason.
